/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/memristor_rawhash.dir/src/bseq.c.o CMakeFiles/memristor_rawhash.dir/src/dtw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memristor_rawhash.dir/src/hit.c.o CMakeFiles/memristor_rawhash.dir/src/kalloc.c.o CMakeFiles/memristor_rawhash.dir/src/kthread.c.o CMakeFiles/memristor_rawhash.dir/src/lchain.c.o CMakeFiles/memristor_rawhash.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memristor_rawhash.dir/src/memristor_cam.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memristor_rawhash.dir/src/memristor_crossbar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memristor_rawhash.dir/src/revent.c.o CMakeFiles/memristor_rawhash.dir/src/rindex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memristor_rawhash.dir/src/rmap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memristor_rawhash.dir/src/roptions.c.o CMakeFiles/memristor_rawhash.dir/src/rseed.c.o CMakeFiles/memristor_rawhash.dir/src/rsig.c.o CMakeFiles/memristor_rawhash.dir/src/rsketch.cpp.o CMakeFiles/memristor_rawhash.dir/src/rutils.c.o CMakeFiles/memristor_rawhash.dir/src/sequence_until.c.o -o memristor_rawhash   -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib  -L/usr/local/opt/libomp/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/opt/libomp/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd /opt/homebrew/lib/libhdf5.320.1.1.dylib -lomp
